commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul says that he was always quick to fill the Gentiles with the truth of the gospel, so that their understanding of the true Son of God might be correct and unshakable. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: You see how Paul goes to where the labor is more and the toil greater.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
